script.output: Supported authentication methods: publickey password keyboard-interactive

key exchange algorithms: (6) curve25519-sha256 ecdh-sha2-nistp256 ecdh-sha2-nistp384 diffie-hellman-group-exchange-sha256 diffie-hellman-group16-sha512 diffie-hellman-group18-sha512 server host key algorithms: (4) rsa-sha2-512 rsa-sha2-256 ecdsa-sha2-nistp256 ssh-ed25519 encryption algorithms: (6) chacha20-poly1305@openssh.com aes128-ctr aes192-ctr aes256-ctr aes128-gcm@openssh.com aes256-gcm@openssh.com mac algorithms: (6) hmac-sha2-256 hmac-sha2-512 hmac-sha2-256-etm@openssh.com hmac-sha2-512-etm@openssh.com compression algorithms: (2) none zlib@openssh.com
Supported Methods: GET HEAD POST PUT DELETE OPTIONS
script.elem: GET HEAD POST PUT DELETE OPTIONS

script.output: HTTP/1.1 200 OK Server: nginx/1.24.0 Date: Sat, 11 Apr 2026 00:20:15 GMT Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 4821 Connection: keep-alive X-Powered-By: Express ETag: W/"12d5-abc123" Vary: Accept-Encoding
/api: API endpoint (200) /health: Health check endpoint (200) /docs: Documentation (200) /login: Login page (200)

Subject: commonName=staging-web-01.lab.internal/organizationName=Staging Lab/countryName=US Subject Alternative Name: DNS:staging-web-01.lab.internal, DNS:staging.lab.internal Issuer: commonName=Staging Lab Internal CA/organizationName=Staging Lab/countryName=US Public Key type: rsa Public Key bits: 2048 Signature Algorithm: sha256WithRSAEncryption Not valid before: 2025-10-01T00:00:00 Not valid after: 2026-10-01T00:00:00 MD5: a1b2 c3d4 e5f6 a7b8 c9d0 e1f2 a3b4 c5d6 SHA-1: a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0

TLSv1.2: ciphers: TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256 TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384 TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA compressors: NULL cipher preference: server warnings: CBC ciphers detected (should use only GCM/CCM) TLSv1.3: ciphers: TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256 TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384 TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256 cipher preference: server
least strength: B

Protocol: 10 Version: 8.0.36 Thread ID: 42 Capabilities flags: Long Passwords, Supports Compression, Interactive Client, Speaks 4.1 Protocol Some Capabilities: SupportsTransactions, ConnectWithDatabase, DontAllowDatabaseTableColumn, InteractiveClient, SupportsLoadDataLocal, LongColumnFlag, SupportsMultipleStatments, SupportsAuthPlugins, SupportsMultipleResults Status: Autocommit Salt: hK7xPmN2qR9sT4vWzA8cE1fG3jL5nM7o
information_schema staging_app staging_app_test mysql performance_schema sys
Version: 7.2.4 Mode: standalone OS: Linux 6.5.0-28-generic x86_64 Process ID: 1847 Role: master Used Memory: 42.18M Connected Clients: 3 Uptime: 15 days, 7 hours, 22 minutes TCP Port: 6379

finished.summary: Nmap done at Sat Apr 11 00:21:05 2026; 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 65.12 seconds
